privileged_info_summary: This task operates on a real Nx Witness VMS system developed by Network Optix. The system runs on https://localhost:7001 with REST API endpoints at /rest/v1. Authentication uses Bearer token authentication with credentials admin/Admin1234!. The task requires querying the system via five REST API endpoints (/rest/v1/system/info, /rest/v1/servers, /rest/v1/devices, /rest/v1/users, /rest/v1/layouts) and generating a JSON inventory report at /home/ga/Documents/system_inventory.json. The system is initialized with the name 'GymAnythingVMS' and includes 5 virtual test cameras (created via testcamera tool) named Parking Lot Camera, Entrance Camera, Server Room Camera, Lobby Camera, and Loading Dock Camera, plus 5 predefined user accounts (security.operator, camera.admin, site.manager, john.smith, sarah.jones). All data is synthetic, generated during environment setup. The report must include keys for report_generated_at, system, servers, cameras, users, layouts, and summary, and must exclude sensitive fields like passwordHash, cryptSha512Hash, digest, and token.
